name: Eggplant and Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
Note: May be served hot or cold.
Wash and dry eggplant. Slice into 1/4 inch slices. Peel tomatoes. Place about 1/4 cup olive oil in a large skillet; heat. Beat the egg. Season with salt and pepper. Dip eggplant slices in egg, then cracker crumbs, and sauté until crust is golden. Drain on paper. Slice tomatoes. In a deep casserole dish, place a layer of eggplant, then a layer of tomatoes. Season with garlic, basil, salt, and pepper. Continue alternating layers until all eggplant and tomatoes are used. Place in moderate oven until heated through.
